title: 12PCS 532193003 Blade Bolts Washer, Craftsman Replacement Part Compatible With Husqvarna Lawnmower, Compatible With AYP, Compatible With Poulan
features: Premium Material: These blade bolts and washers are precision-engineered from high-quality materials, delivering exceptional durability and corrosion resistance.

Strong Practicality: This blade bolts kit serves as a critical maintenance accessory, designed to replace broken or worn components. By upgrading these fasteners, you extend the lifespan of your equipment, reducing the need for frequent repairs.

Scope of Application: Specifically engineered to replace part number 532193003, this kit is compatible with major brands including Husqvarna, AYP, Poulan, Poulan PRO, Craftsman, Roper, Sears, and more. Always verify your model number prior to purchase to ensure proper fit.

Easy to Use: Installation is straightforward, requiring no specialized tools or advanced skills. The bolts feature precise threading for smooth insertion, while the washers distribute pressure evenly—preventing loosening and ensuring a secure, stable connection.

Long Working Time: Designed for consistent performance, these bolts maintain a strong, stable hold, even in demanding conditions. Their robust construction minimizes wear, reducing the need for frequent replacements and supporting efficient equipment operation over time.
